name: AfdxGetSignalStatus
title: AfdxGetSignalStatus
syntax: long AfdxGetSignalStatus( long packet, char signalName[] ); // form 1
description: This function returns the functional status (FS) of a signal.
return:
functional status value
All other values indicate an error code.

description: Analyze signals from an incoming AFDX packet with two signals without DBC
Analyze signals from an incoming AFDX packet with two signals with DBC
